The science

Two windows.
Every day.
Already open.

Just before sleep. Just after waking. In those minutes your brain shifts into alpha waves — a state of profound receptivity where the subconscious is wide open. Whatever reaches you then bypasses the critical mind entirely and lands where your beliefs, habits, and identity are stored.

KALM is built around those two moments. Nothing else.

The alpha window

The moment
before the day
begins.

The two windows

The brain opens
twice every day.

06:30
Morning · Alpha State

Before the day takes over

In the first minutes after waking, beta waves have not yet taken hold. The critical mind is still quiet. This is when KALM sets your intention — before the noise of the day can.

22:30
Evening · Alpha State

After the day releases you

As the body prepares for sleep the brain slows from beta to alpha. KALM enters at the alpha stage — before sleep closes the door — and plants what you want to grow overnight.

The practice

Your session.
Your pace.

Four steps. Ten minutes. Done before you fall asleep.

01

AI writes your personal script

Tell KALM what you want to become. It generates affirmations in your language — words that sound like you, not a wellness manual.

02

Record your own voice

Your voice is the instrument. Research shows the subconscious responds 40% more effectively to your own voice than any other. KALM plays it back at the right moment.

03

7.83 Hz deepens the window

Earth's own electromagnetic frequency corresponds precisely to the alpha brainwave state. It plays beneath everything — widening the channel, deepening your receptivity.

04

Set the alarm. Sleep.

KALM schedules itself to your sleep and wake times. You do nothing. The reprogramming happens in the moments you are most open — not the moments you try hardest.

"

I didn't expect anything. I woke up three days in and my inner voice had changed. I can't explain it any other way.

Beta tester · Zürich

01

Your affirmations. Your language.

Tell KALM your desires. The AI generates a script in your exact language — English, French, German, Spanish, Hebrew — in words that sound like you said them.

02

Your voice plays back at the right moment.

KALM schedules the session to your alarm. You wake to your own voice, reading your own words, while your brain is still in alpha. This is the window. This is the work.

03

7.83 Hz runs beneath everything.

Earth's frequency plays under your voice and the ambient sound. You cannot hear it directly — but your nervous system responds. It deepens the alpha state. It widens the window.

"The reprogramming happens in the moments you are most open."
